ddt:Target.Name: N_PZ1A_HUD_UDS_VC_20200806
ddt:Target.Description: [N]Aug 6th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Initial creation, based on Rev8.

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control

Item.Text: ALL PATTERN AUTO DIMMING CURVE TEST
ALL PATTERN ILLMINATION CONTROL DUTY TEST

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

Data.Name: RCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to RoutineControl request

Item.Text: (TBD)left flashing indicator ON and right flashing indicator OFF(01h)
(TBD)left flashing indicator OFF and right flashing indicator ON(02h)
(TBD)left flashing indicator ON and right flashing indicator ON(03h)
(TBD)User activation : OFF to AD2L2_HOFF ON NotOperational(01h)
(TBD)System deactivation lvl1 ON NotOperational to OFF(05h)
(TBD)System deactivation lvl2 ON NotOperational to OFF(06h)
(TBD)System deactivation lvl1 ON Operational to ON NotOperational(07h)
(TBD)System deactivation lvl2 ON Operational to ON NotOperational(08h)
(TBD)System deactivation lvl1 ON Operational to OFF(09h)
(TBD)System deactivation lvl2 ON Operational to OFF(0ah)
(TBD)User activation OFF to AD2L2_HON ON NotOperational(01h)
(TBD)System activation : ON NotOperational to ON Operational(02h)
(TBD)System deactivation lvl1: ON NotOperational to OFF(05h)
(TBD)System deactivation lvl2 : ON NotOperational to OFF(06h)
(TBD)System deactivation lvl1 : ON Operational to ON NotOperational(07h)
(TBD)System deactivation lvl2 ON Operational to ON NotOperational(08h)
(TBD)System deactivation lvl1 ON Operational to OFF(09h)
(TBD)System deactivation lvl2 ON Operational to OFF(0ah)
(TBD)User activation : OFF to NotOperational Available wo Longi(01h)
(TBD)NotOperational Available wo Longi to NotOperational Available w Longi(03h)
(TBD)NotOperational Available w Longi to NotOperational Available wo Longi(04h)
(TBD)NotOperational Available w Longi to ON Ready(06h)
(TBD)ON Ready to NotOperational Available w Longi(07h)
(TBD)ON Ready to NotOperational Available wo Longi(08h)
(TBD)ON Operational to NotOperational Available w Longi level1(0dh)
(TBD)ON Operational to NotOperational Available w Longi level2(0eh)
(TBD)ON Operational to NotOperational Available wo Longi level1(0fh)
(TBD)ON Operational to NotOperational Available wo Longi level2(10h)
(TBD)AD/RPK OFF + TD or MRM in regulation(04h)
(TBD)AD2 L2 regulation + TD or MRM in regulation(05h)
(TBD)AD1 L3 regulation + TD or MRM in regulation(06h)
(TBD)RPK regulation + TD or MRM in regulation(07h)
AD/RPK OFF + TD or MRM in regulation(04h)
AD2 L2 regulation + TD or MRM in regulation(05h)
AD1 L3 regulation + TD or MRM in regulation(06h)
RPK regulation + TD or MRM in regulation(07h)

Data.Name: DataRead_$0202_#004_bit0_(TBD)BLINKING TEST (test screen flashing display test)
DataRead_$0203_#004_bit0_(TBD)BRIGHTNESS TEST (TFT luminance setting value switching test)
DataRead_$0204_#004_bit0_(TBD)ROTATION TEST (screen position RIGHT / LEFT direction change test)
DataRead_$0208_#004_bit0_(TBD)BACKLIGHT_POWER and I_LIGHTSENSOR_INTENSITY (Current TFT BackLight PWM value / illuminance sensor value display)
DataRead_$0209_#004_bit0_(TBD)THERMISTOR_ON_TFT and THERMISTOR_ON_LED (Current TFT temperature value indication)
DataRead_$020A_#004_bit0_(TBD)MIRROR TEST (Mirror OPEN / CLOSE operation test)
DataRead_$0211_#004_bit0_(TBD)ALL PATTERN IMAGE TEST (test screen continuous switching display test)
DataRead_$0212_#004_bit0_(TBD)ALL PATTERN BRIGHTNESS TEST (TFT brightness set value continuous switching test)
DataRead_$0213_#004_bit0_(TBD)ALL PATTERN AUTO DIMMING CURVE TEST (Illuminance sensor 20 STEP continuous switching test)
DataRead_$0214_#004_bit0_(TBD)ALL PATTERN ILLMINATION CONTROL DUTY TEST (Icon Value continuous change test)
